sections.paragraph:
- Original: εὐθύνω

- Transliteration: Euthuno

- Phonetic: yoo-thoo'-no

- Definition:

1. to make straight, level, plain

2. to lead or guide straight, to keep straight or direct

a. of the steersman or helmsman of a ship

b. of a charioteer

- Origin: from G2117

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From G2117; to straighten (level); technically to steer: - governor make straight.
